name: Hot Buttered Cow
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the brown sugar and softened butter together until smooth.
2. Stir in the vanilla extract, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, mace, allspice, and salt until well combined.
3. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
4. For each serving, place 1-1/2 teaspoons of batter in a preheated mug along with 1-1/2 ounces dark rum and 1/2 ounce gold or white rum.
5. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
6. Fill the mug with hot milk and serve immediately.
